content: Ellie Perkins: Damn, it’s 3 in the fucking morning and the Commonwealth’s still buzzing like a brothel on discount night. Piper, you look like you just got railed by a super mutant—what’s got you grinning like that? Piper: Oh, you  what, Ellie. MJR’s got this fucking —puts a pulse grenade to shame. Cait’s still twitching from last round, and I’m already plotting how to ride him ’til sunrise. But fuck, the  scandal? Diamond City’s mayor holding secret meetings with Brotherhood dog-knights while synth refugees get pushed into the gutters. Makes me  with rage. Ellie Perkins: Typical fucking politicians. Meanwhile, Nick’s out there solving cases while I’m stuck filing holotapes and fantasizing about that chem dealer with the . But you—you’re out here writing porn and fucking revolution. How’s the magazine selling? Piper: Like hotcakes drenched in Nuka-Cola, baby. Raiders, settlers, even a few Brotherhood pricks sneak copies under their power armor.

Piper: Fucking hell, MJR just looted some pre-war kinky shit—Zeta Invaders and RobCo Fun? Oh, I am  using that for next month’s issue. Human-synth-alien threeways—the Institute doesn’t want you to know the truth! Ellie Perkins: Jesus, Piper, you’re gonna get us all lynched by some Brotherhood paladin with a boner for censorship. But… fuck it, if you need a proofreader, I’ve got . Nick’s case files are drier than a raider’s humor. Piper: That’s the spirit! Next stop: documenting what happens when you feed a Mirelurk Queen a handful of those RobCo Fun chips. Future Pulitzer material, baby.
